creator: dch@freebsd.org
text:
FWIW re-tested this against erlang-runtime21 (which is the closest we have since lang/erlang has been upgraded) and I can't repro this in poudriere erlang-runtime21-21.3.8.24_1 with similar options.

https://pkg.skunkwerks.at/poudriere/build.html?mastername=13_0_x64-default&build=2021-10-01_14h26m55s

Can you share any other details about the build environment? Is this a poudriere build or some other untrustable chimaera?
